item.title: Lieutenant Dani had her splints removed today and as you can see… it’s going to take some getting used to. But nothing gets in this girl’s way and she will adapt to whatever challenges she meets. #kitten #cat #manxsyndrome #catsoftiktok #cats

item.title: The boys got to meet lots of locals, most of whom were quite sweet and friendly to them. We saw at least 2 cats on nearly every block we walked. Unfortunately we didn’t have enough time to see more of Türkiye but we can’t wait to revisit this beautiful c
